article.title: Uber SDE2 DSA Interview Round
article.content:
Question : Design a Reservation System where you are given a list of rooms [roomA, roomB, ...] and starTime and endTime of a meeting. Write a method scheduleMeeting(startTime, endTime) whick books a room if any room is available for that particular time period and returns the roomId , else errors out.

You need to provide the optimised approach for booking the room.

post.content: How did you apply and YoE?

Can we solve this using a min-heap of intervals?
We can maintain a min heap of the size of the rooms. 
Initialize the heap and add all room with default time [0,0]. (a heap event can look like [room1, 0 (start), 0(end)])
Min heap is ordered on end time i.e. the event ending the fastest will be popped first.
When a new interval comes up, peek from the heap to check if the new interval starts after the peeked interval ends.
If the above case is valid, pop from heap and push back the new interval. ([room, newStart, newEnd])
otherwise give an error saying no rooms are available.

Hi Op! can you please clarify my doubts
1. do we need to find for only one metting  or list of meetings  
2. if we find the roomId with given slot then do we need to add again that room to the given list with new timing after that 
scheduled meet

and what approach did you used / were you able to solve? if so with what time complexity 

thanks for the post
YOE? and how did you apply?
